nasb.text: “Son of man, when the house of Israel was living in their own land, they defiled it by their ways and their deeds; their way before Me was like the uncleanness of a woman in her impurity.

esv.text: “Son of man, when the house of Israel lived in their own land, they defiled it by their ways and their deeds. Their ways before me were like the uncleanness of a woman in her menstrual impurity.

cnv.text: “人子啊！以色列家住在他們本土的時候，他們的所作所為玷污了那地。他們所行的在我面前，就像在經期中的婦人那樣污穢。

ccb.text: “人子啊，当以色列人住在本土时，他们的恶行玷污了那里，他们的行为在我眼中就像经期的妇女一样污秽。
